blockers.next_action: continue with local planning while collecting lightweight answers for outcome, constraints, and acceptance checks

next_action: continue with local planning while collecting lightweight answers for outcome, constraints, and acceptance checks
non_claims: does not prove Codex app-server execution
does not prove live tracker or Linear mutation
does not prove public deployment, billing, or public send
does not prove full lifecycle completion
does not access credentials or secret values

research_readback.cannot_pass_with: technical feasibility evidence alone when product, user, customer, alternative, substitute, competitor, antagonist, or value uncertainty is still central
required_outputs: disconfirming evidence and reasons the app may not matter
facts, assumptions, and opinions separated clearly
research_readback.required_when: before Selection when Research is requested or product uncertainty is material
